title: Ubiquiti UACC-OADP-SC-APC-50 - UFiber Adapter APC, 50-pack
category: Ubiquiti / Optical networks / Fiber adapters and couplers / SC-SC
description: UACC-OADP-SC-APC-50 optical adapter from Ubiquiti simplex with SC connector on each side with APC polishind type, designed for singlemode cables. It is used for connecting eg two optical patch cables. The package contains 50 pieces of these connectors GPSR Technical support for this product is available on [email protected] email or sending a request via web form .
